summary: Route-based edit screens testing complete. Both Edit Beneficiary and Edit Milestone Message pages work correctly with full-page routes replacing the broken modal pattern. Fixed missing estate_id bug in Edit Beneficiary save.

issues: Console warning: <span> cannot be a child of <select> - hydration error from dev tooling instrumentation (non-blocking)

passed_tests: Edit Beneficiary: Form loads with existing beneficiary data (first_name, last_name, email, relation, etc.)
Edit Beneficiary: Back button returns to beneficiaries list
Edit Beneficiary: Save button works (after fix) - redirects to list with success toast
Edit Beneficiary: Cancel button returns to beneficiaries list
Edit Milestone Message: Route /messages/:messageId/edit navigates correctly
Edit Milestone Message: Form loads with existing message data (title, content, recipients, trigger)
Edit Milestone Message: Back button returns to messages list
Edit Milestone Message: Save button works - redirects to list with success toast
Edit Milestone Message: Cancel button returns to messages list
No blank screen or route crash when opening either edit route
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: EditBeneficiaryPage.js line 185 - Added missing estate_id to PUT payload (was causing 422 Unprocessable Entity)
Console warning about <span> inside <select> is from React dev tooling instrumentation, not actual code - non-blocking
seed_data_creation: Used existing beneficiary 'Route Editor' and message 'Test' from prior test setup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Route-based edit pages for beneficiaries and messages are fully functional. The old modal pattern has been replaced with full-page routes: /beneficiaries/:id/edit and /messages/:id/edit. Both pages load existing data, support save/cancel, and properly navigate back to their list pages. Rate limiting on login can occur with rapid testing (~10 requests triggers 429).

beneficiary_edit_route: Navigation from list to edit route works
Form pre-populated with existing beneficiary data
Save persists changes and redirects back
Back/Cancel returns to list without saving
Direct URL access to edit route works
message_edit_route: Navigation from list to edit route works
Form pre-populated with existing message data
Trigger type selection present and functional
Save persists changes and redirects back
Back/Cancel returns to list without saving

bug_fixed.description: Edit Beneficiary save was returning 422 Unprocessable Entity
bug_fixed.root_cause: Missing estate_id in PUT /api/beneficiaries/:id payload - BeneficiaryCreate model requires estate_id as a required field
bug_fixed.fix: Added estate_id: beneficiary?.estate_id to the PUT payload in EditBeneficiaryPage.js handleSave function
